holdings.infoBox: DVOL is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are The TJX Companies stock at 3.40%, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation at 3.11%, Ventas at 3.05%, Welltower at 3.03%, and Omega Healthcare Investors at 2.93%.

overview.description: The First Trust Dorsey Wright Momentum & Low Volatility ETF (DVOL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dorsey Wright Momentum Plus Low Vol index. The fund tracks an index of 50 large- and mid-cap, low-volatility stocks exhibiting relative strength. Holdings are weighted by the inverse of their volatility. DVOL was launched on Sep 5, 2018 and is issued by First Trust.
